✦ 12,000+ HAPPY CUSTOMERS
✦ SIZE INCLUSIVE XS-4XL

<style>
/* ===== COLLECTION PAGE - MATCH HOMEPAGE CARDS ===== */

/* Background */
results-list.product-grid-container,
.main-collection-grid,
.section-background { background: #f5f1ea !important; }

/* ── Card Gallery: overflow hidden for zoom + slide ── */
.product-grid .card-gallery {
  overflow: hidden !important;
  position: relative !important;
}

/* ── Image zoom on hover ── */
.product-grid .card-gallery slideshow-component,
.product-grid .card-gallery slideshow-slide,
.product-grid .card-gallery .product-media-container,
.product-grid .card-gallery .product-media,
.product-grid .card-gallery img {
  transition: transform 0.5s ease !important;
}
product-card:hover .card-gallery slideshow-component,
product-card:hover .card-gallery .product-media-container,
product-card:hover .card-gallery img {
  transform: scale(1.05) !important;
}

/* ── BADGES: Force top-left position (like homepage) ── */
.product-grid .product-badges,
.product-grid .product-badges--top-right,
.product-grid .product-badges--bottom-left {
  top: 12px !important;
  left: 12px !important;
  right: auto !important;
  bottom: auto !important;
  z-index: 5 !important;
}
.product-grid .product-badges__badge {
  background: #1e2a38 !important;
  color: #d4c5a9 !important;
  font-size: 10px !important;
  letter-spacing: 1.5px !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  padding: 6px 12px !important;
  font-weight: 600 !important;
  border-radius: 2px !important;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif !important;
}

/* ── Quick Add: reposition as full-width bottom bar ── */
.product-grid quick-add-component.quick-add {
  position: absolute !important;
  inset: auto 0 0 0 !important;
  z-index: 4 !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
  display: block !important;
}
.product-grid .quick-add__product-form-component {
  height: auto !important;
  width: 100% !important;
}
.product-grid .quick-add__product-form-component .shopify-product-form {
  display: block !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  height: auto !important;
}

/* ── Quick Add Button: full-width bar ── */
.product-grid .quick-add__button,
.product-grid .quick-add__button.add-to-cart-button,
.product-grid button.quick-add__button {
  position: relative !important;
  bottom: auto !important;
  right: auto !important;
  left: auto !important;
  top: auto !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  height: auto !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  border: none !important;
  background: #1e2a38 !important;
  color: #d4c5a9 !important;
  padding: 14px 20px !important;
  font-size: 11px !important;
  letter-spacing: 2px !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  font-weight: 600 !important;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
  display: flex !important;
  justify-content: center !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  backdrop-filter: none !important;
  pointer-events: all !important;
  cursor: pointer !important;
  transform: translateY(100%) !important;
  transition: transform 0.3s ease !important;
  scale: 1 !important;
}

/* Slide up on hover */
product-card:hover .quick-add__button,
product-card:hover .quick-add__button.add-to-cart-button,
product-card:hover button.quick-add__button,
product-card:focus-within .quick-add__button {
  transform: translateY(0) !important;
  scale: 1 !important;
}

/* Hide the cart icon, show text always */
.product-grid .quick-add__button .add-to-cart-icon {
  display: none !important;
}
.product-grid .quick-add__button .add-to-cart-text {
  background: transparent !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  justify-content: center !important;
  height: auto !important;
}
.product-grid .quick-add__button .add-to-cart-text__content {
  grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
}
.product-grid .quick-add__button .add-to-cart-text__content > span,
.product-grid .quick-add__button .add-to-cart-text__content > span span {
  opacity: 1 !important;
  filter: none !important;
  translate: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  color: #d4c5a9 !important;
  font-size: 11px !important;
  letter-spacing: 2px !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  display: inline !important;
}
/* Make text visible on mobile too */
.product-grid .quick-add__button .is-visually-hidden-mobile,
.product-grid .quick-add__button .add-to-cart-text__content.is-visually-hidden-mobile {
  clip: unset !important;
  clip-path: none !important;
  width: auto !important;
  height: auto !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
  position: static !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
}

/* No hover scale */
.product-grid .quick-add__button:hover {
  scale: 1 !important;
  background: #2a3a4a !important;
}
.product-grid .quick-add__button::before {
  display: none !important;
}

/* ── Mobile: always show quick add ── */
@media(max-width:749px){
  .product-grid .quick-add__button,
  .product-grid .quick-add__button.add-to-cart-button {
    transform: translateY(0) !important;
    padding: 11px 16px !important;
    font-size: 10px !important;
  }
  .product-grid .quick-add__button .add-to-cart-text__content > span span {
    font-size: 10px !important;
  }
}

/* ── Product Title ── */
.product-grid product-title,
.product-grid product-title *,
.product-grid product-title a {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif !important;
  font-weight: 300 !important;
  font-size: 16px !important;
  color: #1a1a1a !important;
  line-height: 1.3 !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
}

/* ── Price ── */
.product-grid .price,
.product-grid .price *,
.product-grid .product-card__content [class*='price'] {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif !important;
  font-size: 15px !important;
  color: #1a1a1a !important;
}
.product-grid .price s,
.product-grid .price .price--compare,
.product-grid .price del {
  color: #999 !important;
  text-decoration: line-through !important;
}

/* ── Color swatches ── */
.product-grid .tsukie-block-colorpicker {
  margin-top: 8px !important;
  margin-bottom: 8px !important;
}
.product-grid .tsukie-block-swatches {
  gap: 6px !important;
}
.product-grid .tsukie-block-swatch {
  width: 18px !important;
  height: 18px !important;
  border-radius: 50% !important;
  border: 1px solid #c9c9c9 !important;
}
.product-grid .tsukie-block-swatch.active {
  border: 2px solid #1e2a38 !important;
}

/* ── Card spacing ── */
.product-grid .product-card__content,
.product-grid .product-grid__card {
  gap: 10px !important;
}

/* ── Mobile responsive ── */
@media(max-width:749px){
  .product-grid product-title,
  .product-grid product-title * {
    font-size: 14px !important;
  }
  .product-grid .price,
  .product-grid .price * {
    font-size: 14px !important;
  }
  .product-grid .tsukie-block-swatch {
    width: 15px !important;
    height: 15px !important;
  }
}

/* ── Hide slideshow arrows on cards ── */
.product-grid .card-gallery slideshow-arrows {
  display: none !important;
}
</style>
